title: Energizing Crumbly Honey Crumble
description: An earthy and crumbly Portuguese dish featuring raw-friendly honey with toast as a side, designed to be an energizing snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup raw hazelnuts
ingredients.notes: Pine nuts can be used as a substitute

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup raw almonds
ingredients.notes: Pecans or cashews can be substituted

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons clear honey
ingredients.notes: Use locally sourced honey for best flavor and texture

ingredients.name: 2 ripe bananas
ingredients.notes: Overripe bananas work better as they will turn into a softer crumble

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup unsweetened shredded coconut
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with any raw-friendly sweetener

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: For added tanginess and antioxidant benefits

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons almond meal or flour
ingredients.notes: To help with binding and texture

instructions: Toast hazelnuts in a dry skillet over medium heat until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
In a mixing bowl, combine toasted hazelnuts, almonds, and shredded coconut. Add lemon juice, honey, salt, and almond meal or flour to taste.
Stir gently with a spatula or your hands until ingredients are evenly distributed.
Press banana pulp firmly into the mixture, pressing down slightly for a crumbly texture.
Divide the mixture into 4 portions and shape each portion into an oval shape. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 15 minutes to allow it to firm up.
Serve as is or dust with additional cinnamon before serving.
